title: 日本ダービーの後に・リーズン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket wins the Japanese Derby, and
Biwa Hayahide is terrified by how easily her friend
renders her calculations meaningless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her numerous calculations, Winning
Ticket and Narita Taishin both have something
that keeps defying her estimations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If so, then we just have to factor that "something"
into the equation. Doing so without knowing what
we're dealing with is reckless, but Biwa Hayahide
comes up with a hypothesis.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She realizes she lacks the iron will to improve and
asks me to increase her training intensity to avoid
defeat at the Kikuka Sho.
